<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me look at the initial state to understand the board
initial_frame = frame_from_state(0)
seg = initial_frame.segmentation

print("=== Initial state objects ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] not in ('B', 'G'):
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']} children={n['children']}")

# Let me also check the adjacency list
print("\n=== Adjacency list (non-background) ===")
for pair in seg['adjacency_list']:
    i, j = pair
    ci = seg['nodes'][i]['color']
    cj = seg['nodes'][j]['color']
    if ci != 'B' and cj != 'B':
        print(f"  {i}({ci}) - {j}({cj})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
